history.content:
<thought>
I am currently at row 07 column F, facing downwards. The goal is at row 05 column E. I need to move right, then down, then left, then down. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I need to turn right first. After turning right, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing right. The goal is at row 05 column E. I need to move down first. After moving down, I will turn left and move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing right. The goal is at row 05 column E. I need to move down and then left to reach the goal. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I need to turn left first. After turning left, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing down. The goal is at row 05 column E. I need to move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing down. The goal is at row 05 column E. The cell in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn right to move to the cell to my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing down. The goal is at row 06 column E. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn right to move to the cell to my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing down. The goal is at row 06 column E. The cell in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn right to move to the cell to my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column F, facing down. The goal is at row 06 column E. The cell in front of me is a floor, so I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
